hero.desc: Masseter Botox helps slim a square jaw caused by muscle bulk. It can also ease jaw tension from clenching and teeth grinding.

summary.title: What Masseter Botox Does
summary.desc: Masseter Botox is a treatment where botulinum toxin is injected into the masseter muscles, the strong chewing muscles at the sides of your jaw. When these muscles relax, two things can happen:
summary.point1: Your jaw looks slimmer if the width came mainly from muscle size
summary.point2: Your jaw feels less tight if you clench, grind, or wake up with soreness
summary.quickDesc: Takes about 10-15 minutes • Return to normal routine same day
summary.wideNote: *Masseter Botox works best when muscle bulk is a major cause

bestFor.title: What Masseter Botox Is Best For
bestFor.card1Desc: Create a softer, more tapered contour over time by relaxing overactive masseter muscles
bestFor.card2Desc: Reduce the force of clenching and grinding, leading to fewer 'tight jaw' mornings
bestFor.card3Desc: Supportive treatment for jaw pain and TMD symptoms by reducing muscle overwork

timeline.title: Results Timeline
timeline.desc: Masseter Botox is not a "one-night" change. It's gradual, and that is actually a good thing because it looks natural.
timeline.expDesc: Most patients describe it as quick and manageable. You may feel small pinches and slight pressure. Some people choose numbing cream, especially if they are nervous, but many do not need it.
timeline.expQuote: "The most common 'after' feeling is mild tenderness at the injection points for a short time."

pricing.title: Units & Pricing
pricing.unitsDesc: Units depend on your masseter size, facial shape goals, and whether you want help for grinding.
pricing.unitsNote: per side, based on muscle strength
pricing.unitsDisclaimer: At Nexus Clinic KL, your plan should be based on your face, not a one-size template.
pricing.priceDesc: Malaysia price references for masseter Botox:
pricing.priceNote: *If you see "too cheap to be true" promos, be careful. Always choose qualified medical providers.

compare.title: Masseter Botox vs Other Treatments
compare.comp1Botox: Relaxes muscle, reduces bulk over time
compare.comp1Note: If jaw looks wide mainly from muscle, Botox is first choice
compare.comp2Alt: Focuses on lifting and tightening skin
compare.comp2Note: HIFU alone will not 'shrink' the masseter
compare.comp3Note: Most choose Botox first for lower commitment

faq.q1: How long does masseter Botox last?
faq.a1: Most people see results for about 3 to 6 months. Stronger muscles may wear off faster at first.
faq.q2: How soon will I see results?
faq.a2: Some people feel less tension within days. Visible jaw slimming usually becomes clearer around 4 to 6 weeks.
faq.q3: Does masseter Botox help teeth grinding?
faq.a3: It can reduce the force of grinding and clenching by relaxing the masseter muscle. Some people feel fewer jaw tension symptoms after treatment.
faq.q4: Will masseter Botox make my face sag?
faq.a4: It can, in some cases, especially if the goal is aggressive cosmetic slimming and the skin has less elasticity. A careful plan and realistic goals reduce the risk.
faq.a5: Yes. Men often request it for jaw tension, grinding, or to soften a bulky lower face. The dosing approach may differ based on muscle strength.

cta.title: Ready for a softer jawline
cta.desc: Book a consultation at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur to get a plan based on your face shape, muscle strength, and goals.
